Est. in the Heart of Tallinn Old Town · Since 1420s
Our Story

Where History
Meets the Table

Nestled in the cobblestone heart of Tallinn's Old Town, Peppersack welcomes guests into a world where medieval grandeur and modern Estonian cuisine converge.

Stone walls, candlelight, folk music and a feast worthy of a merchant king — this is not just a restaurant. It is an experience centuries in the making.

600+Years of History
4.6★Guest Rating
2Unique Halls
∞Memories Made
